nasb.text: Then I took Jaazaniah the son of Jeremiah, son of Habazziniah, and his brothers and all his sons and the whole house of the Rechabites,

esv.text: So I took Jaazaniah the son of Jeremiah, son of Habazziniah and his brothers and all his sons and the whole house of the Rechabites.

cnv.text: 於是我把哈巴洗尼雅的孫子、雅利米雅的兒子雅撒尼亞，以及他的兄弟、他的眾子和利甲全族的人，

ccb.text: 于是，我将哈巴洗尼雅的孙子、雅利米雅的儿子雅撒尼亚，以及雅撒尼亚的弟兄和儿子等利甲全族的人，
